entity: Hakeem Olajuwon career regular-season total blocks = 3,830 (BBR all-time leader). Warehouse SUM(avg_blk*gp) undercounts at 3,790 (delta 40)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_blk * gp)) AS career_blk FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 165 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 3,790 BLK but BBR's official Hakeem Olajuwon career regular-season block total is 3,830. The 40-block gap (over 18 seasons, blocks tracked from 1973-74) is consistent with the same agg_player_season gap pattern. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 3,830. FIXED 2026-07 by the curated-layer rebuild (data/audit/rebuild_curated_layer.sql) + fact_game-based playoff derivation; flipped regression -> stable.
